png

Class PngParser

  • java.lang.Object
    • common.AbstractImageParser<PngMetadata>
      • png.PngParser

  • public class PngParser
extends AbstractImageParser<PngMetadata>
    Parses PNG image files to extract metadata structured within sequential chunks. Processes textual chunks (tEXt, iTXt, zTXt), modification time (tIME), and embedded EXIF (eXIf) data blocks using an asset payload isolation layer. Normally, most PNG files do not contain the EXIF structure, however, it will attempt to search for these 4 potential chunks: ChunkType.eXIf, ChunkType.tEXt, ChunkType.iTXt or ChunkType.zTXt.

    PNG Data Stream

    The PNG data stream begins with a PNG SIGNATURE (0x89 0x50 0x4E 0x47 0x0D 0x0A 0x1A 0x0A) followed by a series of chunks. Each chunk consists of:

    • 4 bytes for data field length (unsigned, usually <= 31 bytes)
    • 4 bytes for chunk type (only [65-90] and [97-122]) ASCII codes
    • Variable number of bytes for data field
    • 4 bytes for CRC computed from chunk type and data only

    There are two categories of chunks: Critical and Ancillary.

    Critical Chunk Types

    • IHDR - image header, always the first chunk in the data stream
    • PLTE - palette table, relevant for indexed PNG images
    • IDAT - image data chunk, multiple occurrences likely
    • IEND - image trailer, always the last chunk in the data stream

    Ancillary Chunk Types

    • Transparency info: tRNS
    • Colour space info: cHRM, gAMA, iCCP, sBIT, sRGB, cICP, mDCV
    • Textual info: iTXt, tEXt, zTXt
    • Miscellaneous info: bKGD, hIST, pHYs, sPLT, eXIf
    • Time info: tIME
    • Animation information: acTL, fcTL, fdAT

    Note: In Windows Explorer, the Date Taken attribute is often resolved from the Creation Time textual keyword rather than the embedded EXIF block. This behaviour can affect the chronological ordering of PNG files when viewed or processed on Windows systems.

    -- For developmental testing -- <u>Some examples of exiftool usages</u> exiftool -time:all -a -G0:1 -s testPNGimage.png exiftool.exe -overwrite_original -alldates="2012:10:07 11:15:45" testPNGimage.png exiftool.exe "-FileModifyDate<PNG:CreationTime" testPNGimage.png exiftool "-PNG:CreationTime=2015:07:14 01:15:27" testPNGimage.png exiftool -filemodifydate="2024:08:10 00:00:00" -createdate="2024:08:10 00:00:00" "-PNG:CreationTime<FileModifyDate" testPNGimage.png
    Since:
    13 August 2025
    Version:
    1.0
    Author:
    Trevor Maggs
    See Also:
    See this link for more technical PNG background information.

      private static class  PngParser.PngChunkData
      An immutable data carrier for the raw metadata chunk layouts extracted from the PNG file stream before directory tree compilation.

      • PngParser

        public PngParser(java.nio.file.Path fpath)
          throws java.io.IOException
        Constructs a new instance with the specified file path.
        Parameters:
        fpath - the path to the PNG file as an encapsulated object
        Throws:
        java.io.IOException - if the file cannot be opened or read

          throws java.io.IOException
        Constructs a new instance from a file path string.
        Parameters:
        file - the path to the PNG file as a string
        Throws:
        java.io.IOException - if the file cannot be opened or read

    • Method Detail

      • readMetadata

        public void readMetadata()
                  throws java.io.IOException
        Reads the PNG file to extract supported metadata chunks, including EXIF, textual properties, and embedded XMP data payloads. This method fully populates internal directories.
        Specified by:
        readMetadata in class AbstractImageParser<PngMetadata>
        Throws:
        java.io.IOException - if an error occurs while reading or parsing the file structure

      • getMetadata

        public PngMetadata getMetadata()
        Retrieves the extracted metadata from the PNG image file. If the metadata has not been explicitly loaded yet, it triggers lazy execution.
        Specified by:
        getMetadata in class AbstractImageParser<PngMetadata>
        Returns:
        a PngMetadata object populated with extracted directories, or empty
        Throws:
        java.io.UncheckedIOException - if an unrecoverable issue occurs during lazy evaluation

      • getImageFormat

        public DigitalSignature getImageFormat()
        Returns the detected PNG format.
        Specified by:
        getImageFormat in class AbstractImageParser<PngMetadata>
        Returns:
        DigitalSignature.PNG

      • formatDiagnosticString

        public java.lang.String formatDiagnosticString()
                                        throws java.io.IOException
        Generates a human-readable diagnostic string containing metadata details.
        Overrides:
        formatDiagnosticString in class AbstractImageParser<PngMetadata>
        Returns:
        a formatted string suitable for diagnostics, logging, or inspection
        Throws:
        java.io.IOException - if lower-level filesystem attributes are inaccessible

      • loadMetadata

        private java.util.Optional<PngParser.PngChunkData> loadMetadata(java.util.EnumSet<ChunkType> chunkFilter)
                                                         throws java.io.IOException
        Loads the filtered metadata elements from the PNG image file.
        Parameters:
        chunkFilter - a filter set of chunk types to allow specific chunks to be processed
        Returns:
        an Optional enclosing a PngParser.PngChunkData carrier. If no supported metadata chunks are detected or parsing fails, an empty data carrier object is still returned wrapped within the Optional
        Throws:
        java.io.IOException - if an unrecoverable issue occurs while accessing the filesystem or reading the stream
